name: WriteTreatmentResource
description: Specifies the settings for a campaign treatment. A treatment is a variation of a campaign that's used for A/B testing of a campaign.

allOf.description: The delivery configuration settings for sending the treatment through a custom channel. This object is required if the MessageConfiguration object for the treatment specifies a CustomMessage object.
The message configuration settings for the treatment.
The schedule settings for the treatment.
The allocated percentage of users (segment members) to send the treatment to.
The message template to use for the treatment.
A custom description of the treatment.
A custom name for the treatment.
